message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

actor User as user1
participant "Frontend" as frontend
box Clerk #LightBlue2
  participant ReservationService as reservation_service_clerk
  participant TicketRepository as ticket_repository_clerk
  participant EventBus as event_bus_clerk
end box
box TicketMaster #LightCyan3
  participant TicketMasterService as tm_service
  participant TicketMasterRepository as tm_repo
  participant OrderManager as order_manager_tm
end box
database DB as db_main

== Initial Request ==
activate user1
note right of user1 : reserve button
deactivate user1
frontend ->> reservation_service_clerk: POST /reservations\n{\n tickets: [\n {\n programId: 1,\n sectorId: 1,\n seatId: 5\n },\n {\n programId: 1,\n sectorId: 1,\n seatId: 6\n }\n ]\n}
reservation_service_clerk -->+ ticket_repository_clerk: validate tickets
ticket_repository_clerk -->>- reservation_service_clerk 

alt invalid 
    note over reservation_service_clerk,tm_service: [invalid] \nReservationRejected: code, reason
else valid  
   activate reservation_service_clerk
   
     createReservationCommand <- - reservation_service_clerk
     
      alt
      
         else publish CreateReservation
        
        end
    
       deactivate reservation_service_clerk   
       
     
      
    
        
          handle CreateReservation <-- event_bus_clerk
          
            check if all tickets are FREE <--> + tm_repo
            
              set status of tickets to RESERVED <-> tm_repo
                
                publishevent_reservation_accepted_event_from_ticket_master_to_ordermanager_for_saving_reserved_tickets_in_db_and_publishing_it_on_websocket_via_frontend
                        
                        save ReservedTicket object for each ticket <-> db_main
                    
                    redirect_user_to_the_correct_page_based_upon_whether_his_request_was_successful_or_not__if_successful_then_he_will_be_redirected_towards_another_screen_where_they_can_proceed_with_payment_otherwise_show_error_message()


@enduml
